## Collections.ReadOnlyConvertingResultMap.forEach() method

Calls a callback for each entry in the map with converted values.

**Signature:**

```typescript
forEach(cb: ResultMapForEachCb<TK, TTARGET>, thisArg?: unknown): void;
```
